data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify uses microservices to enable independent deployment and scaling of various application components.
data.technical_spec: Each microservice is designed to handle a specific business function and communicates with others through APIs.

data.title: Distributed System
data.description: Leveraging a distributed system to ensure reliability and high availability of the service.
data.technical_spec: Uses cloud infrastructure and multiple data centers globally.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Handles user interactions and service activities through real-time event processing.
data.technical_spec: Uses event streams and message brokers like Kafka for real-time data processing.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized entry point for client requests directed towards backend services.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes RESTful and sometimes GraphQL APIs.

data.title: Containerization
data.description: Deploys applications using container technologies for consistency and efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Employs Docker and Kubernetes for container orchestration.
